models.notifications: Alerts and reminders sent to users about deadlines, task assignments, status changes, approvals, and sync events. Each notification can be marked as read or dismissed.
models.notificationPreferences: User settings controlling which types of notifications are enabled and how they're delivered (in-app, WhatsApp). Critical alerts like deadlines remain mandatory.
models.googleCalendarConnection: The connection status between the app and Google Calendar, including the connected account, last sync time, and connection state.
models.syncLogs: A history of Google Calendar sync attempts, showing when syncs occurred, their status, and any error messages.

relationships: Each Notification belongs to a User (the recipient)
Notifications can reference a Task or Event that triggered them
SyncLogs track the history of the GoogleCalendarConnection

notifications.title: Deadline Besok
